creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
It's not about deserving. It's about working with the community and
contributing to the community. It's about leveraging the work pressure of
the FreeBSD committers who are working to provide us a robust stable *NIX
variant.

I will leave it upon the committers to decide.

Happy porting. :D

Regards,
Muhammad

On Wed, Mar 21, 2012 at 4:24 AM, Conrad J. Sabatier <conrads@cox.net> wrote:

> On Tue, 20 Mar 2012 14:51:55 +0600
> Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com> wrote:
>
> > Hi,
> >
> > I have figured it out. Find the attachment. Mine one is smaller
> > compared to yours. According to your original PR's request I am
> > passing out the maintainership to you unless the committer has
> > anything to say. Being the original submitter has it's privilege. :D
> >
> > For the committers reference
> > https://redports.org/~subzero/20120320081709-54608-16603/ch-7.0.0_1.log

>
> Muhammad,
>
> Why don't you go ahead and continue as maintainer.  I don't have any
> problem with that at all.  You've done a lot of work on this thing, and
> deserve the title.  :-)
>
> Thanks!
>
> Conrad
